title: SurfEvents Lite
description: Add minigames into your survival server

## 📌 About

**SurfEvents** is designed as a fun addon for survival servers.

> ⚠️ It is **not intended** to be a full minigame server system
> (although you *can* use it that way if you want).

The plugin focuses on adding **variety and fun**, not overwhelming complexity.

### 🎯 Minigames include:

* Simple: Parkour, Spleeg
* Advanced: Bomberman, SpeedBuilders

---

## ⚙️ Features

* 🗓️ **Automatic event scheduling system**
* ▶️ Start events manually anytime
* 🛠️ **Full in-game editor** for configuration
* 🎮 Multiple minigames ready to use
* 🧩 Easy integration into survival servers

![Editor](https://i.imgur.com/TnrWAf9.gif)
![Editor](https://i.imgur.com/5YYJC87.gif)

---

## 💬 Feedback & Support

Your feedback is essential for the project to grow!

* Join the Discord to suggest ideas or get help
* Use reviews **only for rating**, not bug reports
* This is a **demo version** — more content may be added in the future
